title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report September 15 2021
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report September 15 2021
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report September 15 2021
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 15/09/2021
DCE iron ore futures market continued dropping tendency and I2201 recorded new low since from last May to 682.5yuan/mt. The physical portstock prices plummeted further and PBF in Shandong market was closed at 880yuan/mt, with price drop of 20- 30yuan/mt. In Tangshan market, PBF was closed at 940-950yuan/mt, with price decline of 20yuan/mt.
